title: crm
description: A CRM (Customer Relationship Management) Model is a system that helps a company manage its customers, leads, sales, invoices, subscriptions, support requests, and business relationships in one place.  Simple Definition  CRM = A central database where a company stores and tracks everything related to customers.  Instead of using multiple Excel sheets, emails, and notebooks, all information is organized in one system.
